overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character exploring an elevated walkway in a dense cyberpunk city during a hazy golden hour morning. The player navigates past a red van with NPCs, continues along metal-railed walkways beneath an overpass, descends stairs to street level, and crosses an intersection with futuristic vehicles and neon signage.

events.description: turning left corner on the elevated walkway
discovering a body lying on the concrete ground ahead

agents.ego_description: exploring the elevated walkway, turning corners and observing the environment

large rectangular concrete planter with dead vegetation
massive concrete overpass structure casting shadows overhead
body in green pants lying face down on the concrete
bright red commercial van parked ahead on the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player navigates a gritty elevated walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, surrounded by metal railings and industrial pipes. After turning a corner, they discover a body lying on the ground and spot a red van parked further ahead in the hazy morning light.

passing the parked red van with open doors

crouching beside the van's rear doors, seemingly looting or inspecting something

wooden utility pole with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a red van parked on the elevated walkway, where NPCs are gathered around the open doors. After passing the van and graffiti-covered walls, the player continues along the concrete path with metal railings still visible on the sides.

events.description: continuing straight along the elevated walkway with benches visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the straight section of the elevated path

tall palm tree silhouetted against the bright sky

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a straight section of the elevated promenade lined with park benches and street lamps. In the distance, a lone NPC walks away while futuristic skyscrapers and palm trees are visible through the hazy morning air beyond the metal railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk street canyon with neon signage

events.description: looking up at the towering cyberpunk apartment buildings
neon signs with Japanese characters become visible on the right

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the architecture and neon signs

entered.detail: tall teal-colored residential tower with external air conditioning units and balconies
modern reflective glass building adjacent to the teal tower
vertical neon signs with Japanese characters glowing pink and blue

green metal dumpster with trash bags beside it

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dense urban canyon between towering cyberpunk buildings, looking up at the teal apartment towers and glass skyscrapers. Bright neon signs with Japanese characters illuminate the right side as the player approaches a staircase leading down to street level.

events.description: beginning descent down concrete stairs to street level
reaching the bottom of the stairs and stepping onto the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the concrete stairs to reach the street below

entered.detail: blue metal handrail along the left side of the stairs
asphalt road with painted markings visible at the bottom of the stairs
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
contemporary building with dark glass facade and large entrance
large illuminated advertisement screen showing animated content

segments.scene_description: The player descends a flight of concrete stairs with a blue metal handrail, transitioning from the elevated walkway to street level. At the bottom, a crosswalk with yellow stripes and a modern glass building with digital billboards come into view.

events.description: stepping onto the crosswalk to cross the street
futuristic pink sedan drives past through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk while observing the futuristic vehicles

notable_agents.action: pink sedan with white top driving through the intersection
white flatbed truck stopped at the crosswalk waiting

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail track crossing overhead
traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
vintage-style pink and white car driving on the road
white commercial flatbed truck with cab-over design

segments.scene_description: The player reaches street level and crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk in a sunlit urban intersection. A pink sedan drives past while a white truck waits at the crossing, with modern glass buildings and an overhead bridge visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty, industrial elevated walkway down into a vibrant, sunlit cyberpunk intersection. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass among industrial pipes and metal railings, passing a body on the ground before approaching a red van surrounded by NPCs. As the camera moves past graffiti-covered walls, the environment opens into a straight promenade lined with benches and palm trees, with futuristic skyscrapers looming through the hazy morning light. The scene then shifts into a dense urban canyon of teal apartment towers and glowing Japanese neon signs before the camera descends a flight of concrete stairs with a blue handrail. Finally, the perspective reaches street level, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk as a pink sedan and white truck navigate the intersection beneath towering glass buildings.
